character_concepts: Pebble, a friendly screenless AI companion speaker: a smooth rounded matte pebble body with a soft glowing light-ring that shows its mood, no screen at all, gentle and curious, with tiny wheels to move around the home.
Screeny, an anthropomorphic smartphone character all screen and no soul, glossy and frantic, always demanding attention.
Ive-cube, a minimalist floating design cube, sleek and thoughtful, radiating calm craft.

clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Pebble, a smooth screenless AI companion speaker with a soft glowing light-ring, watches from the side as a frantic crowd of glossy smartphone characters races to cram glowing AI onto pocket screens under a big banner reading everyone expects a phone, cool tech-expo lighting, quietly curious mood-glow, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic depth. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Slow push-in past the phone crowd to Pebble waiting calmly -> the smartphones jostle to put AI on tiny screens while a banner promises a phone -> Voice (calm, wry): everyone assumed the future was AI on a screen in your pocket. -> SFX: frantic notification pings, a calm low hum.

clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Pebble the screenless companion speaker rolls out under a spotlight and settles into a cozy warm living room, its soft light-ring glowing friendly, a big hand-lettered sign reading no screen on purpose behind it, the phone crowd gasping in the soft-focus background, warm inviting lighting, delighted gentle mood-glow, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic detail. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Spotlight snaps on as Pebble rolls forward and nestles into a living room -> its light-ring warms up while the phones gasp at the screenless reveal -> Voice (bright, surprised): instead, a screenless speaker made to live in your house. -> SFX: a soft reveal chime, a gentle crowd gasp.

clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Pebble the screenless companion speaker rests contentedly on a shelf in a cozy family living room at dusk, a small hand-lettered sign nearby reads a bet worth watching, a tiny thoughtful question mark floating above it, warm lamplight glow, calm honest mood-ring, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic lighting. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Slow orbit around Pebble on the shelf -> it glows softly as a small honest question mark drifts up beside it -> Voice (warm, honest): a bet on a new shape for AI, worth watching, not pre-ordering on faith. -> SFX: gentle room ambience, a soft pensive tone.
